Every app is scanned with VibeCode QA — 22 automated checks covering types, tests, security, architecture, and more. Click a grade to see the full report.

Viewport Audit

Every app on FreeAppStore is loaded in iframes at every reference viewport and audited live for fit, scroll, and clipping. Click an app to see its layout at all 12 reference device sizes.

← All apps

—

Iframes are scaled-to-fit previews; pointer-events are disabled. Each frame loads the app at the actual device pixel size, then the app's embedded reporter posts its overflow / clipping numbers back here.

Free Apps

Free forever, open source, privacy-first.
